narrative:
Jasper (precinct in Fayette County) has 444 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.3 percentage points.
